title: Hemionitis ekmanii
taxonomy: Hemionitis ekmanii is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, commonly known as the wood fern family. This classification places Hemionitis ekmanii within the larger group of leptosporangiate ferns. The genus Hemionitis is part of a larger group of ferns, which are non-vascular plants that reproduce via spores. Further classification includes the subfamily Dryopteridoideae, and then the family Dryopteridaceae. Hemionitis ekmanii's classification is a key part of its identity and allows for its understanding within the broader plant kingdom.
